title: Fx_Polarity Property
description: This returns the status of or sets whether the force trigger is triggered by either being within the thresholds or being outside of the thresholds in the specified axis in the direction of translation.
notes: XX_Polarity returns the status of or sets whether the force trigger is triggered by either being within the thresholds or being outside of the thresholds in the specified axis in the direction of translation.
examples:
Function SettingPolarity FSet FT1.Enabled, True, False, False, False, False, False, False, False FSet FT1.Fx_Polarity, FG_OUT FSet FT1.Fx_Levels, -50, 50 Trap 1, FT1 Call ForceError
Fend
